<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-TW">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Cheers 氣泡水 × 畢業季 | Cheers to You!</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Sans+TC:wght@300;400;500;700;900&family=Bebas+Neue&family=Dancing+Script:wght@700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --tiffany: #81D8D0;
    --tiffany-dark: #4ABFB5;
    --tiffany-light: #B8EEE9;
    --tiffany-pale: #E8F9F8;
    --navy: #0A2E3D;
    --gold: #F5C842;
    --text: #1A3A45;
  }
  * { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }
  html { scroll-behavior:smooth; }
  body { font-family:'Noto Sans TC',sans-serif; background:var(--tiffany-pale); color:var(--text); overflow-x:hidden; }

  nav {
    position:fixed; top:0; left:0; right:0; z-index:100;
    padding:15px 40px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;
    background:rgba(129,216,208,0.12); backdrop-filter:blur(14px);
    border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); transition:background .35s;
  }
  nav.scrolled { background:rgba(10,46,61,0.93); }
  .nav-logo { font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif; font-size:28px; color:white; letter-spacing:3px; text-decoration:none; }
  .nav-links { display:flex; gap:28px; list-style:none; }
  .nav-links a { color:rgba(255,255,255,.85); text-decoration:none; font-size:13px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:1px; transition:color .2s; }
  .nav-links a:hover { color:white; }
  @media(max-width:600px){ .nav-links{display:none;} nav{padding:14px 20px;} }

  #hero {
    position:relative; width:100%; height:100vh; min-height:620px; overflow:hidden;
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    background:linear-gradient(160deg, #A0E6E2 0%, #5DCBC3 28%, #3ABAAF 58%, #1F9E96 100%);
  }

  .cloud-layer { position:absolute; width:200%; height:100%; top:0; left:0; pointer-events:none; }
  .cloud { position:absolute; background:rgba(255,255,255,.82); border-radius:60px; filter:blur(3px); animation:cloudDrift linear infinite; }
  .cloud::before,.cloud::after { content:''; position:absolute; background:rgba(255,255,255,.82); border-radius:50%; }
  .c1{width:240px;height:70px;top:7%;left:4%;animation-duration:34s;}
  .c1::before{width:120px;height:95px;top:-48px;left:38px;} .c1::after{width:80px;height:70px;top:-35px;left:120px;}
  .c2{width:320px;height:90px;top:15%;left:54%;animation-duration:44s;animation-delay:-13s;}
  .c2::before{width:155px;height:118px;top:-58px;left:48px;} .c2::after{width:100px;height:80px;top:-45px;left:170px;}
  .c3{width:200px;height:62px;top:50%;left:2%;animation-duration:28s;animation-delay:-7s;opacity:.78;}
  .c3::before{width:100px;height:80px;top:-40px;left:30px;} .c3::after{width:72px;height:62px;top:-32px;left:100px;}
  .c4{width:270px;height:76px;top:60%;left:67%;animation-duration:38s;animation-delay:-19s;}
  .c4::before{width:125px;height:100px;top:-50px;left:40px;} .c4::after{width:88px;height:72px;top:-40px;left:140px;}
  .c5{width:180px;height:55px;top:31%;left:32%;animation-duration:31s;animation-delay:-10s;opacity:.68;}
  .c5::before{width:88px;height:72px;top:-36px;left:26px;} .c5::after{width:62px;height:55px;top:-28px;left:88px;}
  .c6{width:360px;height:100px;top:76%;left:16%;animation-duration:50s;animation-delay:-24s;opacity:.62;}
  .c6::before{width:170px;height:128px;top:-64px;left:58px;} .c6::after{width:115px;height:92px;top:-50px;left:200px;}
  @keyframes cloudDrift { 0%{transform:translateX(0)} 100%{transform:translateX(-50%)} }

  .bubbles-bg { position:absolute; width:100%; height:100%; top:0; left:0; pointer-events:none; }
  .bubble { position:absolute; border-radius:50%; border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.5); background:rgba(255,255,255,.1); animation:bubbleRise linear infinite; }
  @keyframes bubbleRise {
    0%   { transform:translateY(100vh) scale(.5); opacity:0; }
    10%  { opacity:1; }
    90%  { opacity:.7; }
    100% { transform:translateY(-100px) scale(1); opacity:0; }
  }

  /* ── CONTRAIL ── */
  #contrail {
    position:absolute; height:3px;
    background:linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255,255,255,.55), rgba(255,255,255,.12), transparent);
    border-radius:3px; width:0; opacity:0;
    top:calc(50% - 8px); right:0; z-index:9;
    transition: none;
    pointer-events:none;
  }

  /* ── PLANE: positioned & animated entirely by JS ── */
  #plane-wrapper {
    position: absolute;
    z-index: 10;
    top: 0; left: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
    will-change: transform, filter, opacity;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 20px 60px rgba(0,60,60,.5))
            drop-shadow(0 4px 16px rgba(74,191,181,.35));
  }

  #plane-img {
    width: clamp(340px, 58vw, 860px);
    height: auto;
    object-fit: contain;
    display: block;
  }

  #plane-img {
    width: clamp(340px, 58vw, 860px);
    height: auto;
    object-fit: contain;
    display: block;
  }

  .hero-content { position:relative; z-index:20; text-align:center; animation:heroFadeIn 1.2s 4.5s both; padding:20px; }
  @keyframes heroFadeIn { from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(28px)} to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)} }
  .hero-badge { display:inline-block; background:rgba(255,255,255,.2); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.5); backdrop-filter:blur(8px); border-radius:30px; padding:6px 22px; font-size:13px; letter-spacing:3px; color:white; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:18px; font-weight:500; }
  .hero-brand { font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif; font-size:clamp(68px,13vw,136px); color:white; letter-spacing:6px; line-height:.88; text-shadow:0 4px 28px rgba(0,70,70,.35); display:block; }
  .hero-sub { font-family:'Dancing Script',cursive; font-size:clamp(22px,4.8vw,42px); color:rgba(255,255,255,.93); margin-top:10px; text-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,60,60,.25); }
  .hero-tagline { font-size:clamp(12px,2vw,16px); color:rgba(255,255,255,.8); margin-top:16px; letter-spacing:2px; font-weight:300; }
  .hero-cta { display:inline-block; margin-top:28px; padding:14px 42px; background:white; color:var(--tiffany-dark); border-radius:50px; font-size:16px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:1px; text-decoration:none; box-shadow:0 8px 30px rgba(0,80,80,.25); transition:all .3s; cursor:pointer; }
  .hero-cta:hover { transform:translateY(-3px); box-shadow:0 14px 40px rgba(0,80,80,.38); background:var(--tiffany-pale); }
  .scroll-hint { position:absolute; bottom:28px; left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%); z-index:20; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:8px; animation:heroFadeIn 1.2s 5.5s both; color:rgba(255,255,255,.72); font-size:10px; letter-spacing:3px; }
  .scroll-arrow { width:20px; height:20px; border-right:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.6); border-bottom:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.6); transform:rotate(45deg); animation:scrollBounce 1.4s ease-in-out infinite; }
  @keyframes scrollBounce { 0%,100%{transform:rotate(45deg) translateY(0)} 50%{transform:rotate(45deg) translateY(6px)} }

  .section-label { font-size:11px; letter-spacing:4px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--tiffany-dark); font-weight:700; margin-bottom:12px; }
  .section-title { font-size:clamp(24px,4.2vw,44px); font-weight:900; line-height:1.18; color:var(--navy); margin-bottom:36px; }
  .section-title span { color:var(--tiffany-dark); }
  .fade-up { opacity:0; transform:translateY(28px); transition:opacity .7s ease,transform .7s ease; }
  .fade-up.visible { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }
  .fade-up:nth-child(2){transition-delay:.1s} .fade-up:nth-child(3){transition-delay:.2s} .fade-up:nth-child(4){transition-delay:.3s} .fade-up:nth-child(5){transition-delay:.4s}

  #campaigns { background:white; }
  #campaigns .inner { max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto; padding:80px 40px; }
  .campaigns-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:40px; }
  @media(max-width:768px){ .campaigns-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;} }
  .campaign-card { border-radius:24px; overflow:hidden; box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(74,191,181,.17); transition:transform .4s,box-shadow .4s; cursor:pointer; background:white; }
  .campaign-card:hover { transform:translateY(-8px); box-shadow:0 24px 60px rgba(74,191,181,.32); }
  .campaign-img-wrap { position:relative; overflow:hidden; aspect-ratio:4/5; background:var(--tiffany-light); }
  .campaign-img-wrap img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; transition:transform .6s; }
  .campaign-card:hover .campaign-img-wrap img { transform:scale(1.04); }
  .campaign-tag { position:absolute; top:16px; left:16px; background:var(--tiffany-dark); color:white; font-size:11px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:2px; padding:5px 14px; border-radius:20px; text-transform:uppercase; z-index:5; }
  .campaign-tag.gold { background:var(--gold); color:#333; }
  .campaign-body { padding:28px; }
  .campaign-date { font-size:12px; color:var(--tiffany-dark); font-weight:700; letter-spacing:1px; margin-bottom:8px; }
  .campaign-title { font-size:22px; font-weight:900; color:var(--navy); line-height:1.3; margin-bottom:12px; }
  .campaign-desc { font-size:14px; color:#5a7880; line-height:1.8; margin-bottom:20px; }
  .campaign-pills { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px; margin-bottom:20px; }
  .pill { display:inline-block; padding:5px 14px; background:var(--tiffany-pale); border:1px solid var(--tiffany-light); color:var(--tiffany-dark); font-size:12px; font-weight:600; border-radius:20px; }
  .campaign-prize { background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--tiffany-pale),#C5F0EC); border-radius:12px; padding:14px 18px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; margin-top:20px; }
  .prize-icon { font-size:24px; }
  .prize-text strong { display:block; font-size:14px; font-weight:900; color:var(--navy); }
  .prize-text span { font-size:12px; color:#5a7880; }
  .steps-list { list-style:none; margin-top:16px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:10px; }
  .steps-list li { display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:12px; font-size:13px; color:#4a6870; line-height:1.6; }
  .step-num { width:24px; height:24px; background:var(--tiffany-dark); color:white; border-radius:50%; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:11px; font-weight:900; flex-shrink:0; margin-top:1px; }

  #social { background:linear-gradient(160deg,var(--tiffany-pale) 0%,#C5F0EC 100%); }
  #social .inner { max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto; padding:80px 40px; }
  .social-intro { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:20px; margin-bottom:40px; }
  .social-handle { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; background:white; border-radius:50px; padding:10px 20px; box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(74,191,181,.2); }
  .social-handle .avatar { width:40px; height:40px; border-radius:50%; background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--tiffany),var(--tiffany-dark)); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:18px; color:white; }
  .social-handle .handle-text strong { display:block; font-size:14px; font-weight:900; color:var(--navy); }
  .social-handle .handle-text span { font-size:12px; color:#5a7880; }
  .verified { color:var(--tiffany-dark); margin-left:4px; }
  .ig-posts-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:20px; }
  @media(max-width:900px){ .ig-posts-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);} }
  @media(max-width:560px){ .ig-posts-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;} }
  .ig-post { background:white; border-radius:16px; overflow:hidden; box-shadow:0 6px 24px rgba(74,191,181,.16); transition:transform .3s,box-shadow .3s; }
  .ig-post:hover { transform:translateY(-5px); box-shadow:0 16px 40px rgba(74,191,181,.3); }
  .ig-post-header { padding:12px 16px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; border-bottom:1px solid #f0f0f0; }
  .ig-avatar { width:36px; height:36px; border-radius:50%; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:15px; color:white; font-weight:900; flex-shrink:0; }
  .ig-user strong { display:block; font-size:13px; color:var(--navy); font-weight:700; }
  .ig-user span { font-size:11px; color:#999; }
  .ig-post-img { width:100%; aspect-ratio:1/1; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; position:relative; overflow:hidden; }
  .img-overlay { position:absolute; inset:0; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; flex-direction:column; gap:8px; background:rgba(0,0,0,.07); }
  .img-text { font-size:clamp(12px,2.5vw,15px); font-weight:900; color:white; text-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.4); text-align:center; padding:0 14px; line-height:1.4; }
  .img-hashtag { font-size:11px; color:rgba(255,255,255,.88); letter-spacing:1px; }
  .ig-post-body { padding:14px 16px; }
  .ig-actions { display:flex; gap:14px; margin-bottom:10px; }
  .ig-action { font-size:20px; cursor:pointer; transition:transform .2s; }
  .ig-action:hover { transform:scale(1.2); }
  .ig-likes { font-size:13px; font-weight:700; color:var(--navy); margin-bottom:6px; }
  .ig-caption { font-size:13px; color:#4a6870; line-height:1.6; }
  .ig-caption strong { color:var(--navy); }
  .ig-caption .hashtag { color:var(--tiffany-dark); font-weight:600; }
  .ig-post-time { font-size:11px; color:#bbb; margin-top:8px; }

  #products { background:white; }
  #products .inner { max-width:1280px; margin:0 auto; padding:80px 40px; }
  .products-hero-strip {
    width:100%; border-radius:28px; overflow:hidden;
    background:linear-gradient(160deg,#0A2E3D 0%,#154555 40%,#1E6070 100%);
    box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(10,46,61,.35);
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    padding:40px 20px; margin-bottom:48px; position:relative;
  }
  .products-hero-strip::before {
    content:''; position:absolute; inset:0;
    background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 110%, rgba(129,216,208,.18) 0%, transparent 65%);
  }
  .products-hero-strip img {
    width:100%; max-width:820px; height:auto; object-fit:contain;
    mix-blend-mode:lighten; animation:stripFloat 4.5s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes stripFloat { 0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)} 50%{transform:translateY(-10px)} }
  .products-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr); gap:18px; }
  @media(max-width:1024px){ .products-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);} }
  @media(max-width:640px)  { .products-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); gap:12px;} }
  .product-card { border-radius:20px; overflow:hidden; border:2px solid var(--tiffany-light); background:var(--tiffany-pale); transition:all .35s; position:relative; }
  .product-card:hover { transform:translateY(-7px); border-color:var(--tiffany-dark); box-shadow:0 16px 40px rgba(74,191,181,.28); }
  .product-card.featured { border-color:var(--gold); box-shadow:0 6px 24px rgba(245,200,66,.22); }
  .pc-badge { position:absolute; top:10px; right:10px; background:var(--gold); color:#333; font-size:10px; font-weight:900; padding:3px 10px; border-radius:20px; letter-spacing:1px; z-index:5; }
  .pc-img-area { aspect-ratio:3/4; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:20px 16px; position:relative; overflow:hidden; }
  .pc-flavor-bg { position:absolute; inset:0; opacity:.85; }
  .pc-bottle { position:relative; z-index:2; width:55%; max-width:90px; animation:bottleFloat 3.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
  @keyframes bottleFloat { 0%,100%{transform:translateY(0) rotate(-1.5deg)} 50%{transform:translateY(-10px) rotate(1.5deg)} }
  .pc-bubbles { position:absolute; width:100%; height:100%; top:0; left:0; pointer-events:none; overflow:hidden; }
  .pcb { position:absolute; border-radius:50%; background:rgba(255,255,255,.3); animation:pcbRise linear infinite; }
  @keyframes pcbRise { 0%{transform:translateY(100%);opacity:0} 20%{opacity:1} 100%{transform:translateY(-100%);opacity:0} }
  .pc-info { padding:14px 16px; background:white; }
  .pc-flavor-tag { font-size:10px; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:3px; }
  .pc-name { font-size:14px; font-weight:900; color:var(--navy); margin-bottom:3px; line-height:1.3; }
  .pc-vol { font-size:11px; color:#888; margin-bottom:10px; }
  .pc-price-row { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; gap:6px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
  .pc-price { font-size:18px; font-weight:900; color:var(--tiffany-dark); }
  .pc-price .orig { font-size:11px; color:#bbb; font-weight:400; text-decoration:line-through; display:block; }
  .pc-price .unit { font-size:11px; color:#999; font-weight:400; }
  .pc-link { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; background:var(--tiffany-dark); color:white; font-size:11px; font-weight:700; padding:7px 13px; border-radius:16px; text-decoration:none; transition:all .2s; white-space:nowrap; }
  .pc-link:hover { background:var(--navy); transform:scale(1.05); }
  .products-footnote { text-align:center; margin-top:32px; font-size:13px; color:#888; line-height:1.8; }

  footer { background:var(--navy); color:rgba(255,255,255,.55); text-align:center; padding:48px 20px; font-size:13px; letter-spacing:1px; }
  footer strong { color:var(--tiffany); }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav id="main-nav">
  <a href="#" class="nav-logo">Cheers</a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#campaigns">活動</a></li>
    <li><a href="#social">社群</a></li>
    <li><a href="#products">產品</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<div id="hero">
  <div class="cloud-layer" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="cloud c1"></div><div class="cloud c2"></div><div class="cloud c3"></div>
    <div class="cloud c4"></div><div class="cloud c5"></div><div class="cloud c6"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="bubbles-bg" id="bubbles-container" aria-hidden="true"></div>
  <div id="contrail"></div>

  <div id="plane-wrapper">
    <img id="plane-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="泰山 Cheers 奇兒思氣泡水聯名彩繪飛機" />
  </div>

  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-badge">✈ 2026 畢業季特別企劃</div>
    <span class="hero-brand">CHEERS</span>
    <div class="hero-sub">to You !</div>
    <div class="hero-tagline">翻玩畢業的百種慶祝 · 每一次開瓶聲 = 一次 Cheers</div>
    <a href="#campaigns" class="hero-cta">探索活動 ↓</a>
  </div>
  <div class="scroll-hint">SCROLL<div class="scroll-arrow"></div></div>
</div>

<div id="campaigns"><div class="inner">
  <div class="section-label">🎯 2026 畢業季活動</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">兩大重磅活動<br><span>一起 Cheers 青春！</span></h2>
  <div class="campaigns-grid">
    <div class="campaign-card fade-up">
      <div class="campaign-img-wrap">
        <div class="campaign-tag gold">🏆 大獎：峇里島來回機票</div>
        <img src="8C982ECD-61F0-4B5D-A993-400F1150A346.PNG" alt="Cheers 舞蹈挑戰賽" loading="lazy"/>
      </div>
      <div class="campaign-body">
        <div class="campaign-date">📅 4.1 TUE — 6.30 MON</div>
        <h3 class="campaign-title">泰山 Cheers 舞蹈挑戰賽</h3>
        <p class="campaign-desc">拿起你的 Cheers，跟著洗腦畢業短曲起舞！上傳 15–60 秒的 Reels，用鏡頭記錄最爽的「畢業 Cheers 時刻」，最大獎送你去峇里島！</p>
        <div class="campaign-pills">
          <span class="pill">🎵 洗腦短曲</span><span class="pill">📱 Reels 挑戰</span>
          <span class="pill">👑 KOL 聯動</span><span class="pill">🗳 網友投票</span>
        </div>
        <ul class="steps-list">
          <li><div class="step-num">1</div>拍攝原創舞蹈影片，搭配 Cheers 氣泡水或指定音樂（15–60 秒）</li>
          <li><div class="step-num">2</div>上傳至 Instagram Reels 並設定公開，Tag @taisan.cheers</li>
          <li><div class="step-num">3</div>加上 <strong>#cheers舞蹈挑戰 #CheersToYou #青春不散場</strong></li>
          <li><div class="step-num">4</div>初賽入選5名，決賽由網友票選 🗳</li>
        </ul>
        <div class="campaign-prize">
          <div class="prize-icon">✈️</div>
          <div class="prize-text">
            <strong>冠軍大獎｜峇里島來回成團機票（最多五人）</strong>
            <span>二獎 2–4 組｜一年份 Cheers 氣泡水</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="campaign-card fade-up">
      <div class="campaign-img-wrap">
        <div class="campaign-tag">📸 巡迴全台 3–5 校園</div>
        <img src="16a03f31-d54d-490f-abc3-c041b2adf5ff.png" alt="Cheers 畢業拍貼機" loading="lazy"/>
      </div>
      <div class="campaign-body">
        <div class="campaign-date">🗓 畢業典禮前1-2週 & 典禮當日</div>
        <h3 class="campaign-title">Cheers × 畢業快閃拍貼機</h3>
        <p class="campaign-desc">用 Tiffany Blue × 鳳凰花，留下最美的四格青春回憶！領免費 Cheers、選獨家濾鏡框、拍紀念拍貼，打卡抽 Nintendo Switch！</p>
        <div class="campaign-pills">
          <span class="pill">🆓 免費氣泡水</span><span class="pill">🎨 三款濾鏡框</span>
          <span class="pill">🎎 超萌吉祥物</span><span class="pill">🎁 抽大獎</span>
        </div>
        <ul class="steps-list">
          <li><div class="step-num">1</div>到站領取免費 Cheers 氣泡水，了解活動規則</li>
          <li><div class="step-num">2</div>選擇框款：<strong>氣泡閃耀 / 清新夢幻 / 青春紀念</strong></li>
          <li><div class="step-num">3</div>拍攝4張連拍，或與吉祥物合照，等待出紙約30秒</li>
          <li><div class="step-num">4</div>上傳並 Tag <strong>#cheers氣泡水畢業拍貼機</strong> 即可抽獎 🎉</li>
        </ul>
        <div class="campaign-prize">
          <div class="prize-icon">🎮</div>
          <div class="prize-text">
            <strong>打卡抽獎｜Tiffany Blue Nintendo Switch 一名</strong>
            <span>每場預計發放 4,000 瓶免費 Cheers 氣泡水</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div></div>

<div id="social"><div class="inner">
  <div class="section-label">📲 社群互動牆</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">網友 <span>#CheersToYou</span> 精選</h2>
  <div class="social-intro">
    <div class="social-handle">
      <div class="avatar">🫧</div>
      <div class="handle-text">
        <strong>@taisan.cheers <span class="verified">✓</span></strong>
        <span>泰山 Cheers 氣泡水官方帳號</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:13px;color:#5a7880;">精選來自網友的真實分享與轉發</div>
  </div>
  <div class="ig-posts-grid">
    <div class="ig-post fade-up">
      <div class="ig-post-header"><div class="ig-avatar" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FF9A9E,#FECFEF);">S</div><div class="ig-user"><strong>sushi_grad2026</strong><span>已追蹤</span></div></div>
      <div class="ig-post-img" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#81D8D0,#4ABFB5);"><div class="img-overlay"><div style="font-size:48px;">🎓🫧</div><div class="img-text">論文終於交出去了！！！<br>CHEERS 🥂</div><div class="img-hashtag">#CheersToYou #青春不散場</div></div></div>
      <div class="ig-post-body"><div class="ig-actions"><span class="ig-action">❤️</span><span class="ig-action">💬</span><span class="ig-action">📤</span><span class="ig-action" style="margin-left:auto;">🔖</span></div><div class="ig-likes">3,241 人說讚</div><div class="ig-caption"><strong>sushi_grad2026</strong> 四年的努力換來這一刻！和同學拿 Cheers 慶祝，感覺就像在乾香檳 ✨ <span class="hashtag">#CheersToYou #cheers舞蹈挑戰 #泰山Cheers</span></div><div class="ig-post-time">2小時前</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ig-post fade-up">
      <div class="ig-post-header"><div class="ig-avatar" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#A8EDEA,#FED6E3);">M</div><div class="ig-user"><strong>meimei_dance</strong><span>已追蹤</span></div></div>
      <div class="ig-post-img" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#F5C842,#FF9A56);"><div class="img-overlay"><div style="font-size:48px;">🕺🏆</div><div class="img-text">入選了！！！<br>舞蹈挑戰賽初賽🥹</div><div class="img-hashtag">#cheers舞蹈挑戰 #去峇里島</div></div></div>
      <div class="ig-post-body"><div class="ig-actions"><span class="ig-action">❤️</span><span class="ig-action">💬</span><span class="ig-action">📤</span><span class="ig-action" style="margin-left:auto;">🔖</span></div><div class="ig-likes">7,892 人說讚</div><div class="ig-caption"><strong>meimei_dance</strong> 哭哭！！！初賽入選了！！快來幫我投票啊大家 🙏 峇里島我來了！✈️ <span class="hashtag">#CheersToYou #cheers舞蹈挑戰 #峇里島</span></div><div class="ig-post-time">5小時前</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ig-post fade-up">
      <div class="ig-post-header"><div class="ig-avatar" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#667EEA,#764BA2);">J</div><div class="ig-user"><strong>jason_east_soochow</strong><span>已追蹤</span></div></div>
      <div class="ig-post-img" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#43B89C,#81D8D0);"><div class="img-overlay"><div style="font-size:48px;">📸🩵</div><div class="img-text">拍貼機太好看了<br>Tiffany Blue 永遠的神</div><div class="img-hashtag">#cheers氣泡水畢業拍貼機</div></div></div>
      <div class="ig-post-body"><div class="ig-actions"><span class="ig-action">❤️</span><span class="ig-action">💬</span><span class="ig-action">📤</span><span class="ig-action" style="margin-left:auto;">🔖</span></div><div class="ig-likes">2,156 人說讚</div><div class="ig-caption"><strong>jason_east_soochow</strong> 今天在學校廣場遇到 Cheers 拍貼機！！ 還有免費氣泡水🫧 清新夢幻款真的我的菜 <span class="hashtag">#cheers氣泡水畢業拍貼機 #CheersToYou</span></div><div class="ig-post-time">昨天</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ig-post fade-up">
      <div class="ig-post-header"><div class="ig-avatar" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FF6B9D,#C44B8A);">L</div><div class="ig-user"><strong>lily_graduation_2026</strong><span>已追蹤</span></div></div>
      <div class="ig-post-img" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FF6B9D,#FF9A56);"><div class="img-overlay"><div style="font-size:48px;">👩‍🎓🎉</div><div class="img-text">和室友們最後一次<br>一起慶祝！不哭 😭</div><div class="img-hashtag">#青春不散場 #CheersToYou</div></div></div>
      <div class="ig-post-body"><div class="ig-actions"><span class="ig-action">❤️</span><span class="ig-action">💬</span><span class="ig-action">📤</span><span class="ig-action" style="margin-left:auto;">🔖</span></div><div class="ig-likes">5,430 人說讚</div><div class="ig-caption"><strong>lily_graduation_2026</strong> 大學最後一次和室友乾杯 🥲 用 Cheers 代替香檳，我們說好下次見面再 Cheers 一次 💙 <span class="hashtag">#青春不散場 #CheersToYou #泰山Cheers</span></div><div class="ig-post-time">2天前</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ig-post fade-up" style="border:2px solid var(--tiffany-dark);">
      <div class="ig-post-header"><div class="ig-avatar" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#81D8D0,#4ABFB5);">官</div><div class="ig-user"><strong>taisan.cheers <span style="color:#4ABFB5;">✓</span></strong><span>官方帳號</span></div></div>
      <div class="ig-post-img" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0A2E3D,#1A5A70);"><div class="img-overlay"><div style="font-size:52px;">🫧✈️</div><div class="img-text" style="font-size:18px;">青春不散場<br>Cheers to You!</div><div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--tiffany-light);margin-top:4px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;">CHEERS × 2026 畢業季</div></div></div>
      <div class="ig-post-body"><div class="ig-actions"><span class="ig-action">❤️</span><span class="ig-action">💬</span><span class="ig-action">📤</span><span class="ig-action" style="margin-left:auto;">🔖</span></div><div class="ig-likes">18,234 人說讚</div><div class="ig-caption"><strong>taisan.cheers</strong> 謝謝每一位一起 Cheers 的你們！每一瓶 Cheers 都是青春最美的記憶 🩵 <span class="hashtag">#CheersToYou #cheers舞蹈挑戰 #青春不散場</span></div><div class="ig-post-time">3天前</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ig-post fade-up">
      <div class="ig-post-header"><div class="ig-avatar" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#84FAB0,#8FD3F4);">K</div><div class="ig-user"><strong>kol_dancegirl_tw</strong><span>已追蹤</span></div></div>
      <div class="ig-post-img" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#84FAB0,#8FD3F4);"><div class="img-overlay"><div style="font-size:48px;">💃🎵</div><div class="img-text">大家一起來跳！<br>超洗腦停不下來 🎶</div><div class="img-hashtag">#cheers舞蹈挑戰 #KOL</div></div></div>
      <div class="ig-post-body"><div class="ig-actions"><span class="ig-action">❤️</span><span class="ig-action">💬</span><span class="ig-action">📤</span><span class="ig-action" style="margin-left:auto;">🔖</span></div><div class="ig-likes">12,077 人說讚</div><div class="ig-caption"><strong>kol_dancegirl_tw</strong> 【合作】和 @taisan.cheers 一起發佈超可愛畢業短曲！跟我一起跳然後拍 Reels，峇里島機票等你拿✈️ <span class="hashtag">#cheers舞蹈挑戰 #CheersToYou #廣告</span></div><div class="ig-post-time">1週前</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div></div>

<div id="products"><div class="inner">
  <div class="section-label">🫧 品牌產品</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">泰山 Cheers 奇兒思氣泡水<br><span>找到你的那一瓶</span></h2>
  <div class="products-hero-strip fade-up">
    <img src="1777603233531_image.png" alt="泰山 Cheers 奇兒思氣泡水全系列" />
  </div>
  <div class="products-grid">
    <div class="product-card fade-up">
      <div class="pc-img-area"><div class="pc-flavor-bg" style="background:linear-gradient(160deg,#e8f0ff,#c8d8f8);"></div><div class="pc-bubbles"><div class="pcb" style="width:7px;height:7px;left:20%;animation-duration:3s;animation-delay:0s;"></div><div class="pcb" style="width:5px;height:5px;left:55%;animation-duration:4.2s;animation-delay:.8s;"></div><div class="pcb" style="width:9px;height:9px;left:75%;animation-duration:3.6s;animation-delay:.4s;"></div></div><svg class="pc-bottle" viewBox="0 0 70 190" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="28" y="4" width="14" height="16" rx="3" fill="#5588cc"/><rect x="26" y="19" width="18" height="14" rx="3" fill="#c8d8f8"/><rect x="14" y="32" width="42" height="128" rx="12" fill="white" stroke="#c8d8f8" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="16" y="85" width="38" height="73" rx="8" fill="#e0ecff" opacity=".75"/><rect x="16" y="95" width="38" height="50" rx="7" fill="white" opacity=".92"/><text x="35" y="113" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="16" font-weight="900" fill="#3366bb">強</text><text x="35" y="126" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="6" fill="#5588cc">EX 強氣泡水</text><text x="35" y="137" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="5" fill="#888">5GV 史上最強氣量！</text><circle cx="25" cy="145" r="2" fill="#c8d8f8" opacity=".8"/><circle cx="45" cy="152" r="1.5" fill="#c8d8f8" opacity=".8"/><rect x="14" y="158" width="42" height="10" rx="6" fill="#c8d8f8"/></svg></div>
      <div class="pc-info"><div class="pc-flavor-tag" style="color:#3366bb;">EX 強氣泡</div><div class="pc-name">強氣泡水</div><div class="pc-vol">500ml · 24入／箱</div><div class="pc-price-row"><div class="pc-price" style="color:#3366bb;"><span class="orig">NT$696</span>NT$499<span class="unit">/箱</span></div><a href="https://www.taisunshop.com.tw/categories/cheers" target="_blank" class="pc-link" style="background:#3366bb;">購買</a></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="product-card featured fade-up">
      <div class="pc-badge">暢銷</div>
      <div class="pc-img-area"><div class="pc-flavor-bg" style="background:linear-gradient(160deg,#B8EEE9,#E8F9F8);"></div><div class="pc-bubbles"><div class="pcb" style="width:7px;height:7px;left:22%;animation-duration:3.2s;animation-delay:.2s;background:rgba(74,191,181,.4);"></div><div class="pcb" style="width:5px;height:5px;left:60%;animation-duration:4s;animation-delay:1s;background:rgba(74,191,181,.4);"></div><div class="pcb" style="width:8px;height:8px;left:78%;animation-duration:3.8s;animation-delay:.5s;background:rgba(74,191,181,.4);"></div></div><svg class="pc-bottle" viewBox="0 0 70 190" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="28" y="4" width="14" height="16" rx="3" fill="#4ABFB5"/><rect x="26" y="19" width="18" height="14" rx="3" fill="#B8EEE9"/><rect x="14" y="32" width="42" height="128" rx="12" fill="white" stroke="#81D8D0" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="16" y="85" width="38" height="73" rx="8" fill="#C5F0EC" opacity=".7"/><rect x="16" y="95" width="38" height="50" rx="7" fill="white" opacity=".92"/><text x="35" y="108" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" font-weight="bold" fill="#0A2E3D">泰山</text><text x="35" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#4ABFB5">Cheers</text><text x="35" y="132" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="5.5" fill="#888">CHEERS TO YOU</text><circle cx="24" cy="142" r="2" fill="white" opacity=".8"/><circle cx="35" cy="150" r="1.5" fill="white" opacity=".8"/><circle cx="46" cy="143" r="2" fill="white" opacity=".7"/><rect x="14" y="158" width="42" height="10" rx="6" fill="#B8EEE9"/></svg></div>
      <div class="pc-info"><div class="pc-flavor-tag" style="color:var(--tiffany-dark);">Original</div><div class="pc-name">原味氣泡水</div><div class="pc-vol">500ml · 24入／箱</div><div class="pc-price-row"><div class="pc-price"><span class="orig">NT$696</span>NT$499<span class="unit">/箱</span></div><a href="https://www.taisunshop.com.tw/products/cheers" target="_blank" class="pc-link">購買</a></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="product-card fade-up">
      <div class="pc-img-area"><div class="pc-flavor-bg" style="background:linear-gradient(160deg,#d4f0a0,#e8f8c8);"></div><div class="pc-bubbles"><div class="pcb" style="width:6px;height:6px;left:18%;animation-duration:3.5s;animation-delay:.3s;background:rgba(120,180,40,.35);"></div><div class="pcb" style="width:8px;height:8px;left:62%;animation-duration:4.3s;animation-delay:.9s;background:rgba(120,180,40,.35);"></div></div><svg class="pc-bottle" viewBox="0 0 70 190" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="28" y="4" width="14" height="16" rx="3" fill="#5aaa00"/><rect x="26" y="19" width="18" height="14" rx="3" fill="#d4f0a0"/><rect x="14" y="32" width="42" height="128" rx="12" fill="white" stroke="#88cc44" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="14" y="95" width="42" height="65" rx="0" fill="#c0e870" opacity=".85"/><rect x="14" y="155" width="42" height="5" rx="0" fill="#c0e870" opacity=".85"/><rect x="16" y="98" width="38" height="50" rx="7" fill="rgba(255,255,255,.88)"/><text x="35" y="108" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="6" fill="#0A2E3D" font-weight="bold">New</text><text x="35" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#4a8800">Cheers</text><text x="35" y="130" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" font-weight="bold" fill="#4a8800">Lemon</text><text x="35" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="5" fill="#666">CHEERS TO YOU</text><circle cx="24" cy="72" r="9" fill="#ffe040" opacity=".8"/><rect x="14" y="158" width="42" height="10" rx="6" fill="#d4f0a0"/></svg></div>
      <div class="pc-info"><div class="pc-flavor-tag" style="color:#4a8800;">Lemon 檸檬</div><div class="pc-name">檸檬氣泡水</div><div class="pc-vol">590ml · 24入／箱</div><div class="pc-price-row"><div class="pc-price" style="color:#4a8800;"><span class="orig">NT$840</span>NT$529<span class="unit">/箱</span></div><a href="https://www.taisunshop.com.tw/products/cheers-lemon" target="_blank" class="pc-link" style="background:#4a8800;">購買</a></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="product-card fade-up">
      <div class="pc-img-area"><div class="pc-flavor-bg" style="background:linear-gradient(160deg,#ffe8a0,#fff4cc);"></div><div class="pc-bubbles"><div class="pcb" style="width:7px;height:7px;left:25%;animation-duration:3.8s;animation-delay:.5s;background:rgba(200,140,0,.35);"></div><div class="pcb" style="width:5px;height:5px;left:68%;animation-duration:4.5s;animation-delay:1.1s;background:rgba(200,140,0,.35);"></div></div><svg class="pc-bottle" viewBox="0 0 70 190" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="28" y="4" width="14" height="16" rx="3" fill="#cc8800"/><rect x="26" y="19" width="18" height="14" rx="3" fill="#ffe8a0"/><rect x="14" y="32" width="42" height="128" rx="12" fill="white" stroke="#ffcc44" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="14" y="95" width="42" height="65" rx="0" fill="#ffcc44" opacity=".85"/><rect x="14" y="155" width="42" height="5" rx="0" fill="#ffcc44" opacity=".85"/><rect x="16" y="98" width="38" height="50" rx="7" fill="rgba(255,255,255,.88)"/><text x="35" y="112" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#cc8800">Cheers</text><text x="35" y="122" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" font-weight="bold" fill="#cc8800">Honey</text><text x="35" y="132" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="5" fill="#666">CHEERS TO YOU</text><rect x="14" y="158" width="42" height="10" rx="6" fill="#ffe8a0"/></svg></div>
      <div class="pc-info"><div class="pc-flavor-tag" style="color:#cc8800;">Honey 蜂蜜</div><div class="pc-name">蜂蜜氣泡水</div><div class="pc-vol">590ml · 24入／箱</div><div class="pc-price-row"><div class="pc-price" style="color:#cc8800;"><span class="orig">NT$840</span>NT$529<span class="unit">/箱</span></div><a href="https://www.taisunshop.com.tw/products/cheers-bee" target="_blank" class="pc-link" style="background:#cc8800;">購買</a></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="product-card fade-up">
      <div class="pc-img-area"><div class="pc-flavor-bg" style="background:linear-gradient(160deg,#ffd860,#fff0a0);"></div><div class="pc-bubbles"><div class="pcb" style="width:6px;height:6px;left:30%;animation-duration:3.3s;animation-delay:.7s;background:rgba(180,130,0,.35);"></div><div class="pcb" style="width:8px;height:8px;left:65%;animation-duration:4.8s;animation-delay:1.3s;background:rgba(180,130,0,.35);"></div></div><svg class="pc-bottle" viewBox="0 0 70 190" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="28" y="4" width="14" height="16" rx="3" fill="#b89000"/><rect x="26" y="19" width="18" height="14" rx="3" fill="#ffd860"/><rect x="14" y="32" width="42" height="128" rx="12" fill="white" stroke="#ffcc00" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="14" y="95" width="42" height="65" rx="0" fill="#ffd040" opacity=".85"/><rect x="14" y="155" width="42" height="5" rx="0" fill="#ffd040" opacity=".85"/><rect x="16" y="98" width="38" height="50" rx="7" fill="rgba(255,255,255,.88)"/><text x="35" y="110" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#9a7000">Cheers</text><text x="35" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="5.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#9a7000">Honey</text><text x="35" y="129" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="5.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#9a7000">Lemon</text><text x="35" y="138" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="4.5" fill="#666">CHEERS TO YOU</text><rect x="14" y="158" width="42" height="10" rx="6" fill="#ffd860"/></svg></div>
      <div class="pc-info"><div class="pc-flavor-tag" style="color:#9a7000;">Honey Lemon</div><div class="pc-name">蜂蜜檸檬氣泡水</div><div class="pc-vol">590ml · 24入／箱</div><div class="pc-price-row"><div class="pc-price" style="color:#9a7000;"><span class="orig">NT$840</span>NT$529<span class="unit">/箱</span></div><a href="https://www.taisunshop.com.tw/categories/cheers" target="_blank" class="pc-link" style="background:#9a7000;">購買</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <p class="products-footnote">
    ✅ 0糖 · 0熱量 · 中央山脈純淨好水 · 香檳般綿密氣泡<br>
    🛒 <a href="https://www.taisunshop.com.tw/categories/cheers" target="_blank" style="color:var(--tiffany-dark);font-weight:700;">泰山線上購物</a> · PChome · MOMO · 全台超商及量販均有販售<br>
    <span style="font-size:12px;">以上為泰山線上購物特惠價，實際售價依各通路為準</span>
  </p>
</div></div>

<footer>
  <div style="margin-bottom:14px;font-size:24px;letter-spacing:4px;font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;color:var(--tiffany);">CHEERS TO YOU !</div>
  <div style="margin-bottom:8px;">泰山企業股份有限公司 × 2026 大創意家 AI+行銷高手青年提案競賽</div>
  <div style="margin-bottom:4px;">提案團隊：<strong>喬努諾喬巴拿</strong>｜東吳大學國際貿易學系</div>
  <div style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);font-size:11px;margin-top:18px;">本頁面為競賽提案模擬用途 · 社群貼文及數據均為示意 · © 2026</div>
</footer>

<script>
  // Bubbles
  const bc = document.getElementById('bubbles-container');
  for (let i = 0; i < 24; i++) {
    const b = document.createElement('div');
    b.className = 'bubble';
    const sz = Math.random() * 24 + 6;
    b.style.cssText = `width:${sz}px;height:${sz}px;left:${Math.random()*100}%;animation-duration:${Math.random()*9+5}s;animation-delay:${Math.random()*10}s;`;
    bc.appendChild(b);
  }
  // Nav scroll
  const nav = document.getElementById('main-nav');
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => nav.classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 80));
  // Reveal
  const obs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => entries.forEach(e => {
    if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('visible'); obs.unobserve(e.target); }
  }), { threshold: 0.1 });
  document.querySelectorAll('.fade-up').forEach(el => obs.observe(el));

  // ── SMOOTH PLANE ANIMATION (JS physics, no CSS keyframe jumps) ──
  (function() {
    const pw   = document.getElementById('plane-wrapper');
    const img  = document.getElementById('plane-img');
    const hero = document.getElementById('hero');
    const contrail = document.getElementById('contrail');

    // Wait for image to load so we know its natural size
    function initPlane() {
      const heroW = hero.offsetWidth;
      const heroH = hero.offsetHeight;
      const imgW  = img.offsetWidth;   // rendered width (clamped by CSS)
      const imgH  = img.offsetHeight;

      // Target: centred in hero
      const targetX = heroW / 2 - imgW / 2;
      const targetY = heroH / 2 - imgH / 2;

      // ── PHASE 1: Fly-in spline (cubic bezier path, 6 waypoints) ──
      // Each waypoint: [normX, normY, scale, rotDeg, blur, opacity]
      // normX/Y are fractions of heroW/H for the img's top-left corner
      const waypoints = [
        // 0% — far right, tiny, tilted nose-up
        [ 1.55, 0.30,  0.055,  6,  2.8, 0.0 ],
        // 18% — entered screen, still small
        [ 1.05, 0.32,  0.18,   4,  1.2, 0.85],
        // 38% — approaching, mid-size
        [ 0.70, 0.40,  0.45,   1,  0.3, 1.0 ],
        // 58% — crossing centre-right, levelling
        [ 0.35, 0.44,  0.78,  -1,  0.0, 1.0 ],
        // 78% — just past centre, slight nose-up
        [ 0.18, 0.41,  0.96,   0.5,0.0, 1.0 ],
        // 100% — settled at centre
        [ targetX/heroW, targetY/heroH, 1.0,  0,   0.0, 1.0 ],
      ];

      const DURATION = 6200; // ms — fly-in total
      const start = performance.now();

      // Smooth cubic interpolation helper
      function smoothstep(t) { return t * t * (3 - 2 * t); }
      function lerp(a, b, t)  { return a + (b - a) * t; }

      // Catmull-Rom spline for a single axis across all waypoints
      function spline(pts, t) {
        const n   = pts.length - 1;
        const seg = Math.min(Math.floor(t * n), n - 1);
        const u   = t * n - seg;
        const p0  = pts[Math.max(seg - 1, 0)];
        const p1  = pts[seg];
        const p2  = pts[Math.min(seg + 1, n)];
        const p3  = pts[Math.min(seg + 2, n)];
        // Catmull-Rom
        return 0.5 * (
          (-p0 + 3*p1 - 3*p2 + p3) * u*u*u +
          (2*p0 - 5*p1 + 4*p2 - p3) * u*u +
          (-p0 + p2) * u +
          2*p1
        );
      }

      // Extract per-axis arrays from waypoints
      const wX   = waypoints.map(w => w[0] * heroW);
      const wY   = waypoints.map(w => w[1] * heroH);
      const wS   = waypoints.map(w => w[2]);
      const wR   = waypoints.map(w => w[3]);
      const wB   = waypoints.map(w => w[4]);
      const wO   = waypoints.map(w => w[5]);

      // Ease-in-out curve — slow start (distant approach), fast middle, gentle brake
      function flyEase(t) {
        // Custom: fast take-off, smooth arrival
        if (t < 0.5) return 2 * t * t * t;           // ease-in cubic
        const f = -2*t + 2;
        return 1 - f*f*f / 2;                         // ease-out cubic
      }

      // ── Floating state after arrival ──
      let floatPhase = 0;
      let floatStartTime = 0;
      const FLOAT_PERIOD = 5800; // ms per cycle
      const FLOAT_AMP_Y  = 11;   // px vertical bob
      const FLOAT_AMP_R  = 1.6;  // deg tilt

      function floatTick(now) {
        const elapsed = now - floatStartTime;
        const t = (elapsed % FLOAT_PERIOD) / FLOAT_PERIOD;
        const s = Math.sin(t * Math.PI * 2);           // smooth sinusoidal
        const bobY = s * FLOAT_AMP_Y;
        const tilt = s * FLOAT_AMP_R;
        const x = targetX;
        const y = targetY + bobY;
        pw.style.transform = `translate(${x}px,${y}px) rotate(${tilt}deg)`;
        requestAnimationFrame(floatTick);
      }

      // ── Contrail animation (JS-driven, tracks plane) ──
      let contrailStart = null;
      const CONTRAIL_DUR = 2200;

      function contrailTick(now) {
        if (!contrailStart) contrailStart = now;
        const t = Math.min((now - contrailStart) / CONTRAIL_DUR, 1);
        const ease = smoothstep(t);
        const planeProgress = Math.min((now - start) / DURATION, 1);
        // Position contrail just behind the plane's leading edge
        const cx = spline(wX, flyEase(planeProgress));
        const cy = spline(wY, flyEase(planeProgress));
        const sc = spline(wS, flyEase(planeProgress));
        const trailW = sc * imgW * 0.6 * ease;
        const trailX = cx + sc * imgW * 0.55;
        contrail.style.width   = trailW + 'px';
        contrail.style.left    = trailX + 'px';
        contrail.style.top     = (cy + sc * imgH * 0.35) + 'px';
        contrail.style.opacity = (Math.sin(t * Math.PI) * 0.55).toString();
        if (t < 1) requestAnimationFrame(contrailTick);
        else { contrail.style.opacity = '0'; }
      }

      // ── Main fly-in tick ──
      function flyTick(now) {
        const raw = Math.min((now - start) / DURATION, 1);
        const t   = flyEase(raw);

        const x  = spline(wX, t);
        const y  = spline(wY, t);
        const sc = spline(wS, t);
        const r  = spline(wR, t);
        const bl = Math.max(spline(wB, t), 0);
        const op = Math.max(spline(wO, t), 0);

        pw.style.transform = `translate(${x}px,${y}px) scale(${sc}) rotate(${r}deg)`;
        pw.style.opacity   = op;
        if (bl > 0.05) {
          pw.style.filter = `drop-shadow(0 ${4+sc*16}px ${8+sc*52}px rgba(0,60,60,${0.15+sc*0.35})) blur(${bl}px)`;
        } else {
          pw.style.filter = `drop-shadow(0 ${4+sc*16}px ${8+sc*52}px rgba(0,60,60,${0.15+sc*0.35})) drop-shadow(0 4px 16px rgba(74,191,181,.3))`;
        }

        if (raw < 1) {
          requestAnimationFrame(flyTick);
        } else {
          // Snap to exact final pos then start floating
          pw.style.transform = `translate(${targetX}px,${targetY}px) scale(1) rotate(0deg)`;
          pw.style.opacity   = '1';
          pw.style.filter    = 'drop-shadow(0 20px 60px rgba(0,60,60,.5)) drop-shadow(0 4px 16px rgba(74,191,181,.35))';
          floatStartTime = performance.now();
          requestAnimationFrame(floatTick);
        }
      }

      // Kick off contrail at 30% through flight
      setTimeout(() => requestAnimationFrame(contrailTick), DURATION * 0.28);

      // Start fly-in
      pw.style.opacity = '0';
      requestAnimationFrame(flyTick);

      // Handle window resize: recompute targetX/Y (re-init)
      let resizeTimer;
      window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
        clearTimeout(resizeTimer);
        resizeTimer = setTimeout(initPlane, 200);
      });
    }

    if (img.complete && img.naturalWidth) {
      initPlane();
    } else {
      img.addEventListener('load', initPlane);
    }
  })();
</script>
</body>
</html># ggg
